trivia_bullets.text: Modern Horizons 3 (MH3), released June 14, 2024, is a draft-innovation set that injects Modern-legal cards directly into the format rather than via Standard rotation. The set revisits multiple planes through its planeswalker flipcard cycle, each accompanied by a personal Saga; the Faithful Watchdog hails from that same expansive set environment. [Scryfall: set_type = draft_innovation, released_at 2024-06-14]

Flavor text: "Though its official designation was Third Battalion Patrol Hound 7, the soldiers dubbed their new companion Lord Fancy-Paws." The contrast between bureaucratic military designation (Third Battalion Patrol Hound 7) and the soldiers' affectionate nickname (Lord Fancy-Paws) is the joke's entire engine — rank-and-file soldiers quietly defying institutional coldness with attachment. [Scryfall: flavor_text field]

Faithful Watchdog is a 0/0 Dog that enters with three +1/+1 counters, effectively a 3/3 for {G}{W} with Vigilance. As a Pauper-legal common (confirmed in Scryfall legalities), it offers a clean rate in counter-synergy shells. EDHREC rank 8257 places it in the mid-range of MH3 commons — competitive but not widely built-around. [Scryfall: legalities.pauper = legal; edhrec_rank = 8257]

The artist is Samuel Perin, whose Scryfall credits show 17 cards total — a relatively early-career MTG portfolio. The Faithful Watchdog commission appears to be one of his more prominent placements, in a higher-profile slot than the typical bulk-common assignment. [Scryfall: artist = Samuel Perin; Gatherer artist search]
